Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\);let d='''';process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const c=JSON.parse\(d\).result[0];const a=c.answer;const i=a.indexOf\(''mermaid''\);if\(i>0\){console.log\(''Around mermaid:''\);console.log\(a.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-200\),i+200\)\)}else{console.log\(''No mermaid found in answer''\);console.log\(''Looking for text div:''\);const ti=a.indexOf\(''id=""text""''\);console.log\(''text div at:'',ti\);const ei=a.indexOf\(''id=""extra""''\);console.log\(''extra div at:'',ei\);console.log\(a.slice\(0,500\)\)}}\)")
